body.description: While you wear armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC.
When you are wielding a melee weapon in one hand and no other weapons, you gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls with that weapon.
When you roll a 1 or 2 on a damage die for a melee weapon you wield with two hands, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll. The weapon must have the Two-Handed or Versatile property.
When you make an extra attack as part of the Light weapon mastery, you can add your ability modifier to that attack's damage.
